name: pluto-pair
description: Pair Codex with Pluto.jl notebooks through live-session and headless MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and drive Pluto.jl notebooks from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Pair Codex with visible Pluto.jl sessions or open notebooks headlessly, list @bind controls, set bond values reactively, read compact notebook state, and export rendered HTML.
defaultPrompt: Pair with the running Pluto notebook on port 1234.
Open this Pluto notebook headlessly and list its controls.
Set Pluto @bind values and read the new output.
